'''Dangerst squad''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] unit consisting of eleven [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. They were part of a clean-up crew left behind on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taul/Legends|Taul]] after the [[Battle of Taul|assault]] on the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] located on the planet. They participated in the subsequent [[skirmish on Taul]]. The squad was armed with [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Return to Taul}} {{1st}}
